risk_flags.message: Result is a planning estimate only. Values are approximate and cannot be used for filing. Switch to Exact Mode and upload supporting documents before filing.
ITR-4 presumptive income under Section presumptive_business. Maintain turnover/receipt records and bank statements as proof.
Capital gains are present. ITR-2 is required (not ITR-1). Ensure broker / CAMS capital gain statement is available.
Form 16 is not uploaded. This is the primary salary document and is mandatory for exact-mode filing. Obtain Part A and Part B from your employer.
Annual Information Statement (AIS) not uploaded. The income tax department cross-checks AIS against your return. Download from incometax.gov.in > Services > AIS.
Form 26AS not uploaded. TDS credit verification is impossible without this. Download from TRACES / incometax.gov.in.
Taxable income exceeds ₹2.5 lakh but no advance tax has been recorded. If TDS does not fully cover your liability, interest u/s 234B and 234C may apply.

recommendations.plain_english: You have ₹150,000 unused under Section 80C (₹1.5L cap). Consider PPF, ELSS, or additional EPF if you have proof of investment.
Additional NPS contribution up to ₹50,000 qualifies under Section 80CCD(1B) — over and above the ₹1.5L 80C limit.
proof_required: NPS transaction statement / PRAN account statement

recommendations.plain_english: You may claim up to ₹50,000 more under Section 80D for health insurance premiums — only if policies are in your or parents' names.
proof_required: Health insurance premium receipt / policy copy

recommendations.plain_english: Section 44AD presumptive income of ₹0 (8%/6% of turnover) applies. Maintain turnover records and bank statements.
Freelancer profile: verify if 44ADA presumptive (50% of receipts) applies or if actual books (ITR-3) give a lower tax. L2 can ask profession-specific questions.
